segments.text: Down mixup, flip grab! Before the command throw pushes him out. Fair KO—he's definitely not taking that. Back air sends him flying again. This ledge situation from the banana... nothing connected. He's got no jump!
segments.original_text: ダウンの読み合いフリップ掴んでコマンド投げ前に押し出して空中前撃墜はさすがに取らない空中後ろで再び追い出すこの崖展開バナナから何も繋がらなかったかジャンプがないよ

full_text: Down mixup, flip grab! Before the command throw pushes him out. Fair KO—he's definitely not taking that. Back air sends him flying again. This ledge situation from the banana... nothing connected. He's got no jump!
